heading: Regular components: extension of enlistments during war
label: 506 Regular components: extension of enlistments during war
text: An enlistment in the Regular Army, Regular Navy, Regular Air Force, Regular Marine Corps, Space Force, or Regular Coast Guard in effect at the beginning of a war, or entered into during a war, unless sooner terminated by the President, continues in effect until six months after the termination of that war.
notes: CodificationAnother section 506 was renumbered .section 500f of this title
Amendments2023— struck out “Regular” before “Space Force”.Pub. L. 118–312021— substituted “Regular Marine Corps, Regular Space Force,” for “Regular Marine Corps,”.Pub. L. 116–283

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of authorities, functions, personnel, and assets of the Coast Guard, including the authorities and functions of the Secretary of Transportation relating thereto, to the Department of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 468(b), 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6
